flavor.description: Lowercase identifier corresponding to one of the predefined openapi generator target formats. Defaults to 'typescript-axios'.

version.description: Container version tag for openapitools/openapi-generator-cli. Defaults to 'v6.3.0'.

additionalProperties.description: Comma-separated key=value pairs passed to OpenAPI Generator CLI --additional-properties.

openapiJsonPath.description: Path to the openapi definition JSON file (or yml file).

outputPath.description: Path where the output of the openapi will be written.
